title: elsholtzia loeseneri
intro: Elsholtzia loeseneri, also known as mountain mint or Loesener's elsholtzia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce pain and swelling, and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Elsholtzia loeseneri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Elsholtzia loeseneri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
